flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Lake Technical College fell 23% between 2006 and 2009 (85.9% → 65.9%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 14 pp at Lake Technical College vs the 2003–2007 baseline (68.2% vs 82.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Lake Technical College rose 21% between 2021 and 2024 (660 → 799).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Lake Technical College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (70.9% → 79.3%).
